chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-5618 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.24949/2024. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 22.09.2025 Mr. Syed Sultan Ahmed, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Naseer Ahmed and Ms. Rahmat-un-Nisa, Advocates for KDA. Mr. K.A Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Counter Affidavit filed on behalf of the Respondent Nos.2 to 5 reflects that a sum of Rs.10,067,865/- is payable to the Petitioner on account of his Post-retirement dues. Under the circumstances, the aforementioned Respondents are directed to clear/settle such amount within a period of thirty days from today. The Petition stands disposed of in the foregoing terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
